issue_summary: Replaced "MatrixIndexException" with "OutOfRangeException" or "DimensionMismatchException". Removed try/catch blocks misused as preconditions check.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Check if a column index is valid.
     * @param column column index to check
     * @exception MatrixIndexException if index is not valid
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Check if a column index is valid.
     *
     * @param column Column index to check.
     * @throws OutOfRangeException if {@code index} is not valid.
     */
